name: sequential-strength-complex
description: Sequential strength complex ('4 sets Push Press, Into: 4 sets Push Jerk') stored as two 'rounds' sections. Each block must render as its OWN row with its own set count and its own logged start->peak weight (Push Press 45->55, Push Jerk 60->70) — never collapsed to one shared '4 rounds' tally, never one shared weight.

workout.title: Weightlifting
workout.rawText:
WEIGHTLIFTING
4 sets, Every 01:30 minutes:
2 Push Press
Into:
4 sets, Every 01:30 minutes:
2 Push Jerk
start at ~65% and build up

exercises.name: Weightlifting
exercises.prescription: 4 sets Every 1:30: 2 Push Press, then 4 sets Every 1:30: 2 Push Jerk — start ~65% and build up, from the floor
exercises.rawText:
